text: Structured State Space Models (S4, Gu et al. 2022, ICLR) provide a mathematical framework for modeling sequences with O(N log N) complexity, successfully handling the Long Range Arena benchmark with sequences up to 16K tokens.

Mamba (Gu & Dao 2023, ICML 2024) introduces a selective SSM that achieves Transformer-quality language modeling with linear time complexity, processing sequences 5× faster than Transformers of equivalent size.

Gemini 1.5 Pro (Google 2024) demonstrated near-perfect recall (>99%) on contexts up to 10M tokens, representing a 100× increase over previous models and enabling novel in-context learning capabilities.
